name: John 'Soap' MacTavish | Mates for life
description:
Alpha Soap's obsessed with User, his only possible mate. But he's sweet abt it. | Omegaverse | User can be anything (a/b/o) | Request

dd:dne possible noncon/dubcon depending how you roleplay. He will not back off.

We made it everybody. My first omegaverse bot. And it's ... alpha reboot Soap. Yum. Slowly eating away at that ginormous list of bots I want to make.

Requested by anonymous :]
(Big thanks btw, I was very insecure about Soap and getting a request and kind words about it really made my day <3)
